## Agenda

1. Sprint 4 retro summary
2. Sprint 5 scope
3. Infra / on-call changes
4. AOB

---

## Sprint 4 Retro Summary

Overall velocity was **+12%** vs Sprint 3. The OpenAPI plugin integration took longer than
expected due to a version conflict with `docusaurus-theme-openapi-docs@5.x` — added 2 days.

Key wins:
- Homepage redesign shipped and well-received internally
- ADR process adopted by 3 other teams this sprint
- Service dashboard component reused by the Data team

---

## Sprint 5 Scope

**Must-have:**
- Phase 1 parallelism (LangGraph `Send` API) — assigned James
- Algolia search wired into the internal deployment — assigned Priya

**Nice-to-have:**
- Retro board component (already built, needs MDX example page)
- Feedback widget on each doc page

**Out of scope:**
- Multi-tenant pipeline — deferred to Q3

---

## Infra / On-Call Changes

Priya takes over on-call from James on **June 2** (Week 23). PagerDuty schedule updated.
